scripts.build:renderer: pnpm -C packages/client build && pnpm -C apps/renderer/vite build
scripts.guard: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test -p stim-dev -p stim-shared -p stim-controller && pnpm run typecheck:client && pnpm run typecheck:renderer
scripts.typecheck:renderer: pnpm -C packages/client build && pnpm -C apps/renderer/vite typecheck
